project.name: edge-voice-reader
project.description: Standalone Edge-first voice reader extension that uses the hidden Microsoft Ava and Andrew Edge voices, persists voice and speed, and relies on Windows-host validation for live browser playback.

notes: This repo is a standalone Edge Voice Reader extension rather than a localhost daemon app.
Daily validation depends on Windows-host Microsoft Edge even when repo editing happens from the WSL clone.
Keep the product-facing continuity docs in README.md, agent.md, docs/ROADMAP.md, and docs/ROADMAP_ANCHOR.md.
